subject: Upgrade blueprint-proto to 1.4.0.
commit_message:
Upgrade blueprint-proto to 1.4.0.

This is to cover the security vulnerability reported for
com.google.protobuf : protobuf-java : 3.19.4

See drools-applications dependency that transitively picks it up:

        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.onap.ccsdk.cds.blueprintsprocessor.modules</groupId>
            <artifactId>blueprint-proto</artifactId>
        </dependency>

Issue-ID: POLICY-4393
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: I17f609f937cb555e1a72ab8ba1008e667f55870f

Patch Set 1:

@ram, @pam, this patch relates to support for cds actor, I bumped it to the latest version in ccsdk.   I kind of remember some history about this library giving problems in the past, do you recall?   In any case, at least the build/junits go through across repos.   @ram, @liam, any plans to do some cds pairwise regression tests?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I don't recall the history, but I would wait for Ram to review this before merging.
